Game.Name: Donald Duck no Mahou no Boushi (Japan)
Game.plot: Donald Duck no Mahou no Boushi is a 2D Platformer game, developed by SAS Sakata and published by Epoch, which was released in Japan in 1995.http://www.gamefaqs.com/console/snes/home/571330.htmlCheat: PasswordsOn the main menu, select Password and enter any of the following passwords:
Game.Notes: Donald gets transported into a world of dreams through the use of a Magic Cap, and must stop the evil Magician Pete to save this unknown land.
